case_title: LEE STONEMAN VS. VICKY WING KI LAU

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-23-2010, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LAU, VICKY WING KI

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-07-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-07-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
LETTER FROM VICKY WING KI LAU RE: SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT.
JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP. 116.850 FILED BY DEFENDANT LAU, VICKY WING KI
JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP. 116.850 - GRANTED - JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL - FILED BY DEFENDANT LAU, VICKY WING KI
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF STONEMAN, LEE AS TO DEFENDANT LAU, VICKY WING KI
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-07-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STONEMAN, LEE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAU, VICKY WING KI $1,035.69 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,095.69, THE COURT DETERMINES PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES TO BE $1593.37, AND ATTRIBUTES 35% COMPARITIVE FAULT TO PLAINTIFF. THE JUDGMENT IS A NET AWARD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,100.00 FILED BY STONEMAN, LEE AS TO DEFENDANT LAU, VICKY WING KI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-07-2010 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
